title: composition
description: A composite document: an ordered set of separately-composed sections, assembled into one source.md for the design studio to render. Written and maintained by the planner CLI.

objective.description: The high-level document objective, e.g. 'A proposition document for a new B2B analytics startup'.

brand.description: Brand slug (kebab-case). Render reads the docket-local brand of this slug.

format.description: Design format slug (<purpose>-<export>, e.g. proposal-pdf) the assembled source is rendered as.

audience.description: Optional reader-model slug (audience studio). When set, sections/briefs/viz are aligned to that reader's need-state, not only brand voice. Null = brand-only alignment (default).

session.description: The docket production-session that holds inputs/source.md (the assembled doc).

current.description: Semver of the composition itself (bumped on assemble). Starts at 0.0.0.

id.description: Stable kebab-case section id; also the section folder name under sections/.

status.description: todo (placeholder) → briefed (has a brief) → drafted (has content) → approved (ready to assemble).

brief.description: Docket-relative path to the section brief, e.g. sections/<id>/brief.md.

content.description: Docket-relative path to the composed section markdown, e.g. sections/<id>/content.md.

path.description: Docket-relative path to the data source (e.g. assets/tam-2026.csv).

viz.description: Optional chart spec. A suggestion contract only — the design studio's data-viz engine renders it.

type.description: Chart type, e.g. bar, line, area, scatter, pie.

source.description: Docket-relative path to the data source (usually a csv).

origin.description: drafted (written for this doc), provided (user-supplied file), imported (existing composable element).

provenance.description: Free-text note: reference insight, data lineage, or where a provided/imported element came from.
